description_long: This object is a modern surveillance camera with a dome-shaped housing, commonly used for security monitoring in urban environments. The upper section is a flat, polygonal cap that covers the main body, providing protection from the elements. The lower section features a circular lens surrounded by a ring of small, evenly spaced infrared LEDs, indicating night vision capability. The body is primarily composed of smooth, hard materials, likely metal or high-grade plastic, with a matte to semi-gloss finish. The design is compact and robust, intended for mounting on ceilings or overhangs to provide a wide field of view. The overall appearance is utilitarian and discreet, blending into typical urban infrastructure.
description: A dome-shaped surveillance camera with a flat top, circular lens, and visible infrared LED ring, designed for ceiling mounting in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camera lens and a ring of infrared LEDs beneath the flat top cover.
description_view_1: Rear angled view displaying the smooth, featureless back of the camera housing.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the dome shape and the overhanging flat top, with no visible lens.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, showing the continuous dome housing and flat top.
